items.title: One note from Timberwolves summer league practice. SL coach Nathan Bubes said they're working on having Joan Beringer play some at the four alongside Rocco Zikarsky. You can put 2 + 2 together to see why they may want Beringer doing so.
items.author: Chris Hine
items.body_excerpt: One note from Timberwolves summer league practice. SL coach Nathan Bubes said they're working on having Joan Beringer play some at the four alongside Rocco Zikarsky. You can put 2 + 2 together to see why they may want Beringer doing so.

items.title: Tolu Smith dominated both Rocco Zikarsky & Joan Beringer in the G League last year 😳
items.author: Leo S
